summary: November 2025 Cavallo email newsletter announcing the new Trek/Trek Pro/BFB Colour Pop Straps Pack (3 pairs of straps in hunter orange, yellow, turquoise) and Carole Herder's RBC Women of Influence award finalist news.
September 2025 Cavallo newsletter covering Carole Herder's RBC Canadian Women Entrepreneur Innovation Award regional finalist news and a recap of a Cavallo team staff workshop.
October 2024 Cavallo newsletter featuring Queen Elizabeth's pony wearing Cavallo Simple Hoof Boots via the Fell Pony Podcast, and Cavallo's naming-rights sponsorship of the Liberty Horse Festival.
primary_cta: Listen to the Fell Pony Podcast

summary: July 2022 'Cavallo Team' edition newsletter, with Carole Herder's Enterprising Women 'Woman of the Year' award and her personal story of barrel racing and becoming Cavallo President.
Restock announcement for the Cavallo LEB (Long Ear Boot), the only hoof boot designed for donkey anatomy, plus new LEB hoof boot pads for shock absorption and sole protection.
Clinician Julie Goodnight's team field-testing the Cavallo Trek hoof boot on steep terrain, with a video of rider Melissa Arnold and Goodnight's testimonial for Carole Herder's book.
May 2026 Cavallo News Journal featuring the team's 'Keeping it Reel' video editing challenge (three reels to vote on) and a laminitis case study on returning a senior pony to comfort.
2026 clearance promo offering 70% off Cavallo saddle pads, ELB Bling hoof boots, splint boots, halters and fly masks (code HURRY70), as the brand refocuses on hoof boots.
primary_cta: Shop the clearance / Find Your Perfect Pad

summary: June 2026 Cavallo newsletter with an interactive quiz on a horse's 'summer hoof personality' (A/B/C scoring) to help owners spot hoof sensitivity on hard or rocky summer footing.
Introduces the Consteed Smart Hoof Sneaker, a sensor-equipped boot built on the Cavallo Trek platform for measuring equine limb loading and gait, citing a 2026 Veterinary Journal study.
